name: review-only-existing-skill
query: Can you audit my qa-test skill and tell me if it follows best practices?
expected_behavior: Runs scripts/review-skill-structure.sh against the target SKILL.md before producing findings
Defaults to review-only mode since the user said 'audit' not 'fix'
Returns the filled-out assets/skill-review-template.md including the ## Structural check field with real numbers
Verdict is one of: Ready / Needs minor cleanup / Needs major refactor / Risky
